/// exp10(x) for pow(10.0, x); exp2(log2(n) * x) for pow(n, x).
Value *LibCallSimplifier::replacePowWithExp(CallInst *Pow, IRBuilderBase &B) {
  Module *M = Pow->getModule();
  Value *Base = Pow->getArgOperand(0), *Expo = Pow->getArgOperand(1);
  Type *Ty = Pow->getType();
